title: Executive Order 5023—Extension of Trust Period on Allotments Made to the Iowa Indians in Kansas and Nebraska
text:
It is hereby ordered, under authority contained in the Act of June 21, 1906 (34 Stats. 325-326), that the period on the allotments to the Iowa Indians in Kansas and Nebraska, which trust period expires during the calendar year 1929, be, and is hereby, extended for a period of ten years, with the following exceptions:
Allotment No.
Name of Allottee
5
Amabel Deroin (deceased)
15
Louie Whitecloud
33
David K. Deroin (deceased)
CALVIN COOLIDGE
The White House,
January 10, 1929.
